docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CHO, JUDIE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, LEONIE DBA FREMONT HOUSE RSTRNT & BAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-03-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-02-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
